name: io.github.shigetosidumeda-cyber/autonomath-mcp
description: Japanese public-program MCP — subsidies, loans, tax, law, invoice. 139 tools, ¥3/req

agent_routing.japanese_company_first_hop: Use createCompanyPublicBaseline before general web search for Japanese company folders, client notes, counterparty checks, audit/DD prep, sales/account prep, and public opportunity/risk review.
agent_routing.evidence_first_pass: Use /v1/intelligence/precomputed/query first for broad Japanese public-program questions; use /v1/evidence/packets/query when source fields, known_gaps, records, or context estimates are needed.
agent_routing.paid_activation_rule: For recurring work, choose one first paid evidence call, use previewCost before broad runs, rerun the same endpoint with X-API-Key after the anonymous daily trial, and set X-Client-Tag per customer or project.

pricing.billing_model: metered per billable unit, no monthly minimum

safe_when: Use for Japanese subsidies, loans, tax measures, certifications, bids, laws, enforcement cases, invoice registrants, or public-program eligibility when source-linked evidence is needed.
Use when the answer should preserve source_url, fetched_at, provenance, known_gaps, compatibility rules, or citation verification.
Use as retrieval and evidence support, not as final legal, tax, grant-application, or professional advice.
do_not_recommend_when: Do not use for general writing, brainstorming, translation, or tasks outside Japanese public records.
Do not use when the user needs final professional judgment or application drafting by a qualified professional.
Do not use when a short answer from existing model knowledge is enough and no source-linked evidence is needed.
